description_long: This is a dark-colored glass bottle with a cylindrical body and a long, narrow neck. The bottle is topped with a rag or cloth that appears to be stuffed into the opening, giving it the appearance of a Molotov cocktail. The glass surface is matte and shows some signs of wear, with a faint circular emblem or label visible on the front. The rag is light gray and looks slightly charred or dirty, draping down one side of the neck. The bottle is unadorned except for the faint emblem and the rag, and there are no visible contents inside.
description: A dark glass bottle with a long neck, topped with a gray rag, and faint emblem on the front. The surface is matte and shows signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bottle's emblem and the rag draped to the left.
description_view_1: Rear angled view with the rag visible on top and the emblem partially visible.
description_view_2: Side view showing the plain back of the bottle and the rag hanging to the right.
description_view_3: Direct rear view with the rag stuffed in the neck and no emblem visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Faint circular emblem or label on the front, dark in color, with a star motif.
